gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: nahi, mujhe, appointment, karna
sample_turns: Hi, mujhe ek appointment chahiye. Dermatology ke liye. Rahul Patankar. Number hai 9765432100. Weekday theek hai, actually Saturday bhi chalega agar ho toh. 11:30 ho sakta hai? Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!

Hello, Sunrise Clinic? Mera beta hai, uske liye pediatrician appointment book karni hai. Arjun Mehta. Abhi 4 saal ka hai. Usse fever aa raha hai last 2 days se. 9890123456. Haan haan, aaj hi theek hai. Confirm kar dijiye. Nahi, shukriya.
Namaste, mujhe ENT specialist se milna hai. Appointment mil sakta hai? Deepak Shinde. 9876501234. Somvaar theek rahega. Subah ka koi slot hai? 10 baje book kar dijiye. Nahi, bahut dhanyawaad.

Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic hai na? Main ek appointment book karna chahta hoon ophthalmology ke liye. Suresh Bhosale. Number 9823567890 hai. Kal — matlab Budhwaar — agar ho toh. Perfect, 11 AM confirm kar do. Nahi yaar, bas. Thanks!
Haan, mujhe apna appointment cancel karna hai. Kal ka tha. Rajesh Solanki. Dr. Kavitha Reddy ke saath. Kal 2 baje. Sirf cancel. Abhi schedule nahi karunga. Nahi, bas yahi chahiye tha. Dhanyawaad.

Haan, yeh TPA ka matter hai. Meri company ka group mediclaim hai — United India Insurance. Aapke yahan cover hota hai? Haan, ek second... 0505012345678. Yeh hai. Surgery plan hai. Gallbladder ki. Doctor ne bola hai laparoscopic karna padega. Okay. Aur koi documents aur chahiye? Bahut acha, shukriya.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: bill, think, invoice, received
sample_turns: Hi, I received a bill from your clinic but I think there's a mistake in it. One of the items doesn't match what I was told. Neha Gokhale. Invoice number... uh, it's SNC-2024-08821. There's a charge for a procedure I didn't get. Something called 'nebulisation'. I only came for a consultation. Yes, please. 9867001234. Thank you, I hope it gets sorted.

I'm calling about a payment receipt. I paid last week but haven't received any receipt. Is this normal? Harish Menon. I paid on... I think it was the 14th. It was for a cardiology OPD visit. Email please. It's hmenon77@gmail.com. That's all, thanks a bunch.

Hello, I'm trying to pay my bill but your online portal is giving me an error. Can you help? SNC-P-91023. Name is Nikhil Sawant. Payment link would be easier. Send it to my registered number. Got it. Thanks for sorting that quickly.

Hello, this is regarding a bill I received. I think I was double-charged for a blood test. Chandra Bose. Invoice SNC-2024-10987. Good. How long will the refund take? Alright, as long as it gets sorted.

Hello. I just want to confirm — if I pay online, is the payment secure? I'm a bit old-fashioned and worried about these things. And if something goes wrong with the transaction? Okay, I feel better about it now. Thank you for explaining.

Hi. My company's accounts department needs a formal receipt with our company name and GST number on it. Can you issue that? Invoice SNC-2024-11203. Company is Zenith Tech Solutions. GSTIN is 27AAACZ1234F1Z5. accounts@zenithtech.in please. That's all. Thanks.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: insurance, cashless, your, what
sample_turns: Hello, I wanted to check if you accept Star Health insurance. I have a cashless card. Oh great. And what's the process? Do I need to bring any documents? Okay. And if my plan doesn't cover everything, what happens? That sounds fair. Thank you for the info.

Hi, I'm calling about Medicaid... no wait, I mean Mediassist TPA. Do you work with them? That's a relief. I've been trying to find a network hospital close to Kothrud and you guys came up. What if it's an emergency? Do I still need pre-auth? Got it. Very helpful, thanks.

Hello, I want to know if HDFC ERGO health insurance is accepted at your clinic. I want to go the cashless route. My procedure is a knee replacement. Is that covered usually? Right, right. And your insurance desk — when can I visit? Perfect. I'll come by this week. Thank you.

Good morning. I need to understand the reimbursement process. I paid out of pocket at another clinic and now I want to claim it. But the next time, I want cashless here. Understood. And for future cashless at Sunrise? Bajaj Allianz. Wonderful. Thanks for the clear explanation.

Hello, I want to know if you have a dedicated TPA helpdesk at the clinic. And what are their working hours? Can they help with pre-authorisation for a planned surgery? Very helpful. I'll come by Monday.

Hi. I had a surgery at Sunrise last month. I want to file a reimbursement claim because I paid out of pocket. Can you help with the documents? I have most of those. Can I get a duplicate discharge summary from you if I've lost the original? That's helpful. And you'll provide all the itemised bills too? No, I think that covers it. Thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: thank, appointment, saturday, schedule
sample_turns: Hello, uh, I want to schedule a diabetes check-up. My sugar levels have been off lately. Krishnamurti Rao. People usually call me Krish. 9123456780. Hmm, Friday... actually, can I come Monday? 2 PM is better for me work-wise. Do I need to fast before the appointment? That helps, thank you.

Hello, I'd like to schedule an appointment with a dermatologist. I have some skin rashes that won't go away. Kartik Desai. 9876123450. Wednesday would work. What times are available? 12 PM please. Perfect, thank you.

Hi, I want to push my appointment. Got stuck with something at home, can't make it tomorrow. Omkar Kulkarni. It was tomorrow at 11 AM with the GP. Uh, can I do this Friday? Any time in the afternoon? 4:30 PM is better. Nope, that's it. Cheers.

Hi there. I need to move my Saturday appointment to sometime next week. I have a family function. Smita Parekh. Saturday 10 AM with Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Tuesday 11 AM works perfectly. Thank you so much, very sweet of you.

Hello, I have a small request. I want to change my appointment from morning to an afternoon slot if possible. Same day, same doctor. Vaibhav Kamath. I have 9 AM tomorrow with Dr. Nitin Kadam, gastroenterology. Yes! 2:30 PM is perfect. Thank you. Brilliant, thanks.

Hello. I want to book a sleep study. I snore heavily and my wife says I stop breathing sometimes at night. Rajendra Bhatt. 9876543219. Saturday works perfectly. What time do I come? Great. Should I bring anything? Noted. Thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: test, days, blood, haven
sample_turns: Uh hello. I was just wondering, do you have a blood bank or do you only do routine tests? Okay. What about 24-hour lab services? That makes sense. And sample collection at home — do you offer that? Wonderful. That's all I needed to know.

Hello, I came for a blood test two days ago. Uh, I still haven't received my reports. Can you tell me the status? Nandini Sawant. Test was done on... Monday I think. CBC and thyroid panel. Oh. Can you at least tell me if the reports are ready? Okay, please do that.

Hi. I did a urine culture test here 3 days ago. The results haven't come. Can you check? Seema Bhatt. I came last... Tuesday I think. Okay but it's been 3 days. Is that normal for this test? Yes please, I really need to know.
Good afternoon. I'm calling about my biopsy report. It was supposed to be ready today. Santosh Kulkarni. Can you at least find out if it's ready? Please, yes.

Hi, I did some blood tests at your clinic last Friday. Uh, I haven't received the reports yet. Can you check what's happening? Suresh Iyer. It was last Friday, the 30th. I did a full CBC and lipid profile. Oh okay, please do that.
Hi, umm, I submitted my blood samples three days ago and still haven't gotten the report. Can you tell me what's going on? Rajan Iyer. I gave the sample on Monday, 12th. Okay, sure.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: thank, morning, appointment, thursday
sample_turns: Good morning. I need to fix a physiotherapy session. My doctor referred me after a shoulder injury. Meera Pillai. 9900876543. Yes, it was Dr. Sharma from Apollo. Orthopaedics. Tomorrow evening would be ideal. Around 6? No, that's all. Thank you!

Hello, I have an appointment this evening with your neurologist but I'm not going to be able to make it. Can we move it? Siddharth Naik. 9867452301. Umm, is next Saturday possible? Preferably morning. Okay, Thursday 4 PM then. No, that's fine. Thank you.

Hi, I need to reschedule. My child's sick so I can't come today. Tanya Bapat. My appointment was at 12:30 today with the physiotherapist. Uh, maybe day after? Same time if possible. Thank you, appreciate it.

Hello. My name is Prakash Datar. I had a scan appointment — uh, MRI — for this morning but I missed it. Can I reschedule? Ideally Thursday or Friday. Mornings preferred. Yes please, Thursday 9:30 AM. Noted. Thanks a lot.

Good morning. I'd like to reschedule. I booked a neurology appointment for next Monday but I have an exam that day now. Shruti Kulkarni. 9823112244. Maybe the following week? Wednesday or Thursday? Wednesday 2 PM please. Thank you so much!

Hello. I need to shift my father's physiotherapy session. He has some pain and the physio himself suggested resting for a few days. Chandrakant Divekar. He has tomorrow at 10 AM with Mr. Ganesh Khot. Wednesday, next week please. Same 10 AM if possible. Thank you for understanding.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: surgery, should, your, worried
sample_turns: Hi, I had surgery here last week — appendix removal. I wanted to ask about the wound dressing. It looks a little different today. Manoj Thakur. Surgery was on the 17th. Is it serious? Should I be worried? Okay, please hurry.
Hello, I had my tonsil removal surgery here last week. My throat is still hurting a lot. Is this expected? Akash Mishra. Should I come in? Okay, please connect me.

Hi, I'm calling about my husband. He had bypass surgery two weeks ago at your facility. He has a mild fever since yesterday. Should we be concerned? Yes we know it's serious. We just wanted to know if we should rush to emergency or wait. Yes please, quickly.

Hi. My mother had eye surgery — cataract — 5 days ago at your clinic. The eye patch was removed yesterday and her vision is very blurry. Is that normal? Kamala Nair. Should we rush to emergency? Okay, please do that now.

Hello, my mother had a knee replacement surgery at your clinic about ten days ago. She's having some swelling near the incision site and I'm a bit worried. Her name is Sarla Mehta. The surgery was done by Dr. Anand Joshi. Yes please, please transfer quickly, I'm very worried.

Uh, hello. I had an appendectomy at your clinic last week. I'm calling because the pain has come back and there's some discharge from the wound. Should I be worried? My name is Deepak Jadhav. The surgery was done by Dr. Hemant Shirke. Okay, please hurry, I'm quite uncomfortable.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: thank, possible, yeah, consultation
sample_turns: Yeah hi, I was hoping to schedule a consultation. For myself. Uh, general physician kind of thing. Aditi Wagh. W-A-G-H. It's 8800912345. Umm, can I do 10 AM? Is that still available? Yes please. No, that's great. Thanks a lot.

Hello? Yes, I want to make an appointment. For... uh, neurology. I've been getting headaches quite often. Farhan Qureshi. And my number is... hold on... 9512348760. This Thursday is too soon, I think. Let's go with Tuesday. Lovely, thank you very much.

Good evening. I need to see a neurologist. I've been having frequent headaches for the past month. Monday morning would suit me better. What time? Yes please. I'm Farhan Shaikh, my number is 9867001122. Sure, will do. Thanks a lot.

Hello, this is Meghna Thosar. My eye doctor referred me to an ophthalmologist for a possible retina issue. I'd like to get the earliest possible appointment. Yes, absolutely! Tomorrow works perfectly. 9654321087. Thank you for the quick response.

Hello, umm, I'm a bit anxious about this but I think I need a mental health consultation. Do you have a psychiatrist? Wednesday at 3... yeah, okay. I can do that. I'd rather not say on the phone if that's okay. Is that possible? Okay. 9922334455. Thank you. That means a lot.
